intended_use: SubtleMR is an image processing software that can be used for image enhancement in MRI images. It can be used to reduce image noise for head, spine, neck, abdomen, pelvis, prostate, breast, and muscul
intended_use_full: SubtleMR is an image processing software that can be used for image enhancement in MRI images. It can be used to reduce image noise for head, spine, neck, abdomen, pelvis, prostate, breast, and musculoskeletal MRI, or increase image sharpness for head MRI.
ground_truth: Original (unenhanced) MRI images; reader study ratings for visibility assessment
other_metrics: Noise reduction: signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) improved by greater than or equal to 5% on average in selected regions of interest; visibility of small structures rated non-inferior on average based on Likert reader study. Sharpness enhancement: thickness of anatomic structures and sharpness of structure boundaries improved in at least 90% of test datasets.
